name: TAO Value Recovery Scale-In v1
thesis: TAO 4h is the best-fit primary lane for a value-recovery scale-in concept because the brief now asks for improved confirmation across bars rather than one-shot all-in timing, and in full chop the recovery must be proven before size is added.
edge_mechanism: value recovery continuation with staged entry
invalidation_condition: Abort if recovery setups are too rare, if the add-on confirmation conflicts with the initial reclaim, or if the second leg fails to improve expectancy after costs.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Price dislocates from value, reclaims the core reference, then confirms acceptance on subsequent bars strongly enough to justify adding rather than entering full size immediately.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: In choppy markets, the first reclaim often fakes out. Waiting for improving confirmation across bars should reduce false starts while still allowing participation in genuine recoveries.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: TAO 4h is the right primary lane because its volatility can create clear dislocations, but the 4h frame is slow enough for staged confirmation logic to matter.

indicator_role_map.PLUS_DI_14/MINUS_DI_14: direction confirmation for the scale-in leg

pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If TAO keeps oscillating without genuine acceptance, the add-on leg will only amplify noise.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If the base reclaim works but scale-ins hurt expectancy, keep the base entry and demand stronger confirmation before adding.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; reclaim and improved confirmation are sequential, not conflicting
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed by broad recovery thresholds rather than rare extreme oversold events

trade_management.add_on_condition: Next bar closes in trade direction and RSI_14 improves by at least 2 points while DI confirmation persists

long: Stop loss: 1.0 * ATR_14 below blended entry
short: Stop loss: 1.0 * ATR_14 above blended entry
